release_notes: SO1 alerts now trigger only if payroll was run for the previous month\SO2 alerts now trigger only if payroll exists for the previous year\Pastor/Credential Holder tithe alerts now trigger only if payroll produced HQ 5% tithe\Church tithe alerts now trigger only if Finance/Giving tithe exists\Pastor/Church tithe form now has a Mark Submitted option to stop reminders\Empty/reset KLAM should no longer show SO1/SO2 compliance alerts
